name: Szabo Vineyards Tasting Room
self_description: Family-run, from grape to glass. Founder Sandor was raised in Northern California. His Hungarian heritage and decades working abroad gave him an appreciation for European wine-making traditions.

name: Taqueria El Taco Loco
self_description: Taqueria El Taco Loco features authentic and traditional Mexican dishes, including our famous tacos, burritos, enchiladas, sizzling fajitas & more!

name: Taste of Thai
self_description: We are honored to serve you! We would like to take this opportunity to welcome you to your home to great combination of Thai dishes. We serve only the freshest and finest ingredients.

name: The Fern
self_description: The Fern is known for its bartenders making new specialty cocktails. The Fern is becoming one of the best venues in Nevada City, CA booking the hottest local and regional bands.

name: The National Bar
self_description: A legendary haunt serving an abundance of beers, wine, classic and craft cocktails with a small menu of shareable snacks, small bites and sweet treats. Our legendary haunt feels both timeless and refreshingly new.

name: The Outside Inn
self_description: Providing lodging in Nevada City, California, the Outside Inn is a small hotel that sits in a quiet residential neighborhood just two blocks from downtown. A family-owned motel with unique themed rooms under tall pines.

name: The Owl Tavern
self_description: We are two couples with a dream of opening a restaurant in our hometown of Grass Valley, CA. Backed with culinary and agricultural backgrounds, we pride ourselves by providing humanely raised meat and seasonally sourced produce.

name: The Parsonage 1865
self_description: Experience the beauty and charm of this small-town gem, situated in the foothills of the Sierra Nevada Mountains. The Parsonage 1865 is a 10 Bedroom/10 Bathroom Victorian Estate with the capacity to accommodate up to 23 guests.

name: The Pizza Joint
self_description: The Pizza Joint is a small family-run and operated pizzeria in historic downtown Nevada City. Joe and I are both from the East Coast and we love pizza. We moved here 16 years ago and have fallen in love with the community.

name: The Willo Steakhouse
self_description: Established 1969. A Nevada County institution. Voted best steak year after year by the readers of The Union. Over 1 million hand cut, choice, aged New York and Ribeye steaks cooked on our grill.

name: Three Forks Bakery & Brewing Co.
self_description: Since 2014 Three Forks Bakery & Brewing Co has specialized in organic, farm fresh fare. We do many things including a microbrewery, full service coffeeshop, bakery, and farm to table restaurant.

name: Tofanelli's Gold Country Bistro
self_description: Tofanelli's Gold Country Bistro is renowned for many things: Award-winning patio dining, amazing breakfasts, 101 omelet menu, an incredible burger menu. Established in 1890.

name: Wild Eye Pub
self_description: A vibrant, friendly, multi-use venue, anchored by a large dining room with a seasonal, organic and local menu, featuring nightly live music and events, and a full-service bar.

name: Wyld Tiger
notes: Facebook page only; no usable self-description text extracted

name: Art Space
self_description: Art Space is not only a place for making art but also a therapeutic (art) SPACE that holds room for emotional processing and personal growth through creative expression.

name: Bear River Glassworks
self_description: Glass Flameworking Teaching Studio & Creation Center. We offer classes and workshops for all skill levels with bench space rental, tools, and raw materials available on site.

name: Eric Rood Administration Center Lobby
self_description: Art in Public Spaces is a program of Nevada County Arts & Culture in partnership with the County of Nevada. Public art must always strive to be physically and freely accessible.

name: Firehouse No. 1 Museum
self_description: The historic Firehouse No. 1 museum is a diamond located in the heart of historic downtown Nevada City. Completed in the Spring of 1861, this firehouse was home to Nevada Hose Company No.1 from 1861 to 1938.

name: Grass Valley Museum (Formerly St. Joseph's)
self_description: Nestled in the heart of the Sierra Foothills sits the Grass Valley Museum and the Saint Joseph's Cultural Center. We are a recognized state and national historic landmark and home to the historic Russell Rose Garden.

name: Juxtartstudios
notes: Instagram page only; no usable self-description text extracted

name: Nevada County Narrow Gauge Railroad Museum
self_description: Located in Nevada City, California, the Nevada County Narrow Gauge Railroad Museum is dedicated to the preservation of local transportation history and artifacts from the narrow gauge railroad era.

name: North Star House
notes: Page contains excessive markup and styling code; no clear self-description extracted

name: North Star Mining Museum
self_description: The North Star Powerhouse Mining Museum, a part of the Nevada County Historical Society, exists to preserve and protect our area's mining heritage and educates people about the mining process.
